name: Cloudinary signed media upload foundation
description: Build a reusable signed-upload foundation for image/video media: authenticated backend endpoint `POST /api/v1/media/upload-signature` generates Cloudinary SHA-1 signatures from server-controlled parameters (folder/public_id/timestamp + policy checks), and frontend exposes shared API + SDK helpers for two-step signed upload (`requestUploadSignature` then multipart upload to Cloudinary). Scope excludes migrating existing Firebase avatar flow.
evidence: Implemented worker media contract/route/handler/signing lib with Cloudinary env + policy enforcement, added worker integration/unit tests (signature fixture, policy validation, auth/error paths), added web media API + Cloudinary upload SDK + tests for multipart fields/error mapping/2-step flow. Verification passed: pnpm test:worker, pnpm typecheck:worker, pnpm test:web, pnpm typecheck:web, ./init.sh.
